requirement_topic.en: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 Safety Evidence — ANOR PECAE Pre-Shipment Conformity and ARSEL / ENEO Project Approval
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 安全证据——ANOR PECAE装运前合格评定及ARSEL/ENEO项目审批
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 安全證據——ANOR PECAE裝運前合格評定及ARSEL/ENEO項目審批

summary.en: ANOR adopts IEC standards as the technical reference framework for PV equipment conformity assessment under the PECAE pre-shipment programme. For solar PV inverters, the primary safety standards referenced by ANOR for conformity purposes are IEC 62109-1 (Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements) and IEC 62109-2 (Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters). These standards address electrical safety, thermal protection, mechanical integrity, and protection against environmental hazards for inverter equipment. Third-party type-test evidence from an ILAC-accredited laboratory is required for ANOR PECAE Certificate of Conformity issuance for regulated PV products. Additionally, donor/lender-funded projects (AfDB, World Bank, EU) in Cameroon's solar sector consistently require IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test certification as a procurement condition for inverter supply. Bilingual (French/English) documentation is required, reflecting Cameroon's official bilingual status.
summary.zh: ANOR以IEC标准为PECAE装运前计划下光伏设备合格评定的技术参考框架。对于太阳能光伏逆变器，ANOR合格评定引用的主要安全标准为IEC 62109-1（光伏电力系统用功率变换器安全——第1部分：通用要求）和IEC 62109-2（第2部分：逆变器特殊要求）。上述标准涵盖逆变器设备的电气安全、热保护、机械完整性及防环境危害保护。ANOR PECAE颁发受监管光伏产品合格证书，须提供来自ILAC认可实验室的第三方型式试验证据。此外，喀麦隆太阳能行业的捐助方/贷款方资助项目（非洲开发银行、世界银行、欧盟）通常将IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验认证作为逆变器供货的采购条件。鉴于喀麦隆官方双语地位，须提供法文/英文双语文件。
summary.zht: ANOR以IEC標準為PECAE裝運前計畫下光伏設備合格評定的技術參考框架。對於太陽能光伏逆變器，ANOR合格評定引用的主要安全標準為IEC 62109-1（光伏電力系統用功率轉換器安全——第1部分：通用要求）和IEC 62109-2（第2部分：逆變器特殊要求）。上述標準涵蓋逆變器設備的電氣安全、熱保護、機械完整性及防環境危害保護。ANOR PECAE頒發受監管光伏產品合格證書，須提供來自ILAC認可實驗室的第三方型式試驗證據。此外，喀麥隆太陽能行業的捐助方/貸款方資助項目（非洲開發銀行、世界銀行、歐盟）通常將IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗認證作為逆變器供貨的採購條件。鑑於喀麥隆官方雙語地位，須提供法文/英文雙語文件。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62109-2 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters (primary IEC safety standard adopted by ANOR for PV inverter conformity)
IEC 62109-1 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements (parent standard, implicitly applicable with IEC 62109-2)
ANOR PECAE — Programme d'Évaluation de la Conformité Avant Embarquement (Cameroon pre-shipment conformity assessment — IEC-referenced safety evidence required for CoC)

summary.en: China's primary standard for PV grid-connected inverter safety is GB/T 37408-2021 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters, 2021 revision), which covers classification, environmental conditions, safety, electrical performance, EMC, and markings. GB/T 37408 safety testing is conducted at CNAS-accredited Chinese laboratories. While GB/T 37408 shares conceptual safety intent with IEC 62109-1/-2, it is not harmonised with IEC 62109 and is not accepted by ANOR as equivalent to IEC 62109 type-test evidence for PECAE conformity purposes. Donor/lender procurement specifications for Cameroon solar projects do not recognise Chinese GB/T 37408 certificates as equivalent to IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test evidence.
summary.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器安全的主要标准为GB/T 37408-2021（光伏并网逆变器技术要求，2021年修订版），涵盖分类、环境条件、安全、电气性能、EMC和标识。GB/T 37408安全测试在中国CNAS认可实验室进行。尽管GB/T 37408与IEC 62109-1/-2在概念层面安全意图相近，但未与IEC 62109协调，不被ANOR接受为IEC 62109型式试验证据的等效依据，不用于PECAE合格评定。喀麦隆太阳能项目的捐助方/贷款方采购规格不认可中国GB/T 37408证书为IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验证据的等效依据。
summary.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器安全的主要標準為GB/T 37408-2021（光伏並網逆變器技術要求，2021年修訂版），涵蓋分類、環境條件、安全、電氣性能、EMC和標識。GB/T 37408安全測試在中國CNAS認可實驗室進行。儘管GB/T 37408與IEC 62109-1/-2在概念層面安全意圖相近，但未與IEC 62109協調，不被ANOR接受為IEC 62109型式試驗證據的等效依據，不用於PECAE合格評定。喀麥隆太陽能項目的捐助方/貸款方採購規格不認可中國GB/T 37408證書為IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗證據的等效依據。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters, 2021 revision)

gap.en: Chinese GB/T 37408 safety certification does not satisfy ANOR PECAE's IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test requirement for Cameroon. Exporters must obtain IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test certificates from an ILAC-accredited laboratory covering the specific inverter model or family being supplied to the Cameroon project. Existing Chinese safety certificates based solely on GB/T 37408 must be supplemented with IEC 62109-1/-2 test reports before submitting equipment documentation for ANOR PECAE conformity assessment or ARSEL/ENEO project review. Technical documentation submitted to ANOR, ARSEL, and ENEO should be available in both French and English, consistent with Cameroon's official bilingual administrative requirements.
gap.zh: 中国GB/T 37408安全认证不满足ANOR PECAE对喀麦隆产品IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验的要求。出口商须从ILAC认可实验室取得涵盖供应至喀麦隆项目的特定逆变器型号或系列的IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验证书。仅依据GB/T 37408的现有中国安全证书，在提交ANOR PECAE合格评定或ARSEL/ENEO项目审查设备文件前，须补充IEC 62109-1/-2测试报告。提交给ANOR、ARSEL和ENEO的技术文件须同时提供法文和英文版本，符合喀麦隆官方双语行政要求。
gap.zht: 中國GB/T 37408安全認證不滿足ANOR PECAE對喀麥隆產品IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗的要求。出口商須從ILAC認可實驗室取得涵蓋供應至喀麥隆項目的特定逆變器型號或系列的IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗證書。僅依據GB/T 37408的現有中國安全證書，在提交ANOR PECAE合格評定或ARSEL/ENEO項目審查設備文件前，須補充IEC 62109-1/-2測試報告。提交給ANOR、ARSEL和ENEO的技術文件須同時提供法文和英文版本，符合喀麥隆官方雙語行政要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory: IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test evidence from an ILAC-accredited laboratory is required for ANOR PECAE Certificate of Conformity; donor/lender procurement specifications for Cameroon solar projects independently require IEC 62109-1/-2 certification as a supply condition
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary — GB/T 37408-2021 is a recommended national standard (GB/T designation); CQC/CGC voluntary certification available but not required under Chinese law

source.publisher: ANOR — Agence des Normes et de la Qualité (Cameroon National Standards Body)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A solar PV inverter holding only Chinese GB/T 37408 safety certification cannot satisfy ANOR PECAE's IEC 62109-1/-2 conformity requirement for Cameroon. Plan for IEC 62109-1/-2 type testing by an ILAC-accredited laboratory before submitting equipment for ANOR PECAE pre-shipment conformity assessment or ARSEL/ENEO project review. Prepare technical documentation in both French and English. Verify current ANOR PECAE product scope, the appointed inspection body for Cameroon, and model-family coverage requirements directly with ANOR before committing to a test programme.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 仅持有中国GB/T 37408安全认证的太阳能光伏逆变器不能满足ANOR PECAE对喀麦隆产品的IEC 62109-1/-2合格评定要求。在提交ANOR PECAE装运前合格评定或ARSEL/ENEO项目审查设备前，请安排ILAC认可实验室进行IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验。请同时准备法文和英文技术文件。在启动测试计划前，请直接向ANOR核实当前ANOR PECAE产品范围、喀麦隆指定检验机构及型号系列覆盖要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 僅持有中國GB/T 37408安全認證的太陽能光伏逆變器不能滿足ANOR PECAE對喀麥隆產品的IEC 62109-1/-2合格評定要求。在提交ANOR PECAE裝運前合格評定或ARSEL/ENEO項目審查設備前，請安排ILAC認可實驗室進行IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗。請同時準備法文和英文技術文件。在啟動測試計畫前，請直接向ANOR核實當前ANOR PECAE產品範圍、喀麥隆指定檢驗機構及型號系列覆蓋要求。
